creator: feldeci@gmail.com
text:
We've been using version 11 with PHP 7.4 without any issues but after upgrading to PHP 8.1.12 and ioncube-php81-12.0.2 we have the following issue: if I load the ioncube module every PHP process segfaults. If I remove it everything's back to normal.

FreeBSD 12.3-RELEASE-p6 GENERIC  amd64
